settings.onIndexPage_help: If enabled, the discussion list page will display cards.
settings.tagIds_help: Select tags to show cards on. If none are selected, cards appear on all tag pages.
settings.fullWidth_help: If enabled, each card will span the full width instead of two per row.
settings.showParticipants_help: If enabled, each card will display a strip of participant avatars at the bottom.

admin.recalculate_help: Recalculates participant avatars for all discussions. Run this after first installing the extension on an existing forum, or any time you suspect the preview data is out of sync.
admin.recalculate_error: An error occurred. Please try again or use the CLI command.
admin.recalculate_modal_warning: Do not close this window or navigate away until the process is complete.
